pending.body: The acceptance criterion states: 'Output from task commands explains the task↔project mapping where useful (e.g., Task foo (project foo))'. Currently task commands delegate directly to project::handle() which prints project-oriented messages (e.g., 'Selected project {id}'). The task handler should intercept at least the select/show/create output paths to add task-aware messaging, or the acceptance criterion should be explicitly relaxed.

In src/cli/task.rs test task_create_maps_to_project_create_from_bead_args (line 209), the assertion set checks milestone_id, bead_id, project_id, and flow but omits prompt_file. Add `assert_eq!(task_args.prompt_file, project_args.prompt_file);` for completeness.

Make the `task` namespace render task-aware output and remediation text instead of forwarding directly to `project::handle`. Right now `src/cli/task.rs:52-83` delegates every subcommand unchanged, so `task select`, `task list`, `task show`, and `task create` inherit project-only strings from `src/cli/project.rs:154-159`, `src/cli/project.rs:578-607`, `src/cli/project.rs:506-508`, `src/cli/project.rs:665-675`, and `src/cli/project.rs:1993-1999`, plus project-only fallback errors from `src/shared/error.rs:38-47`. On this branch, `ralph-burning task show 9ni92` prints `Project: 9ni92 (active)` and `ralph-burning task select 9ni92` prints `Selected project 9ni92`, so the new command surface does not actually explain the task<->project mapping or keep users in task vocabulary.

Add deterministic behavioral tests for the new `task` namespace. The only new coverage is the parser-focused unit tests in `src/cli/task.rs:95-272`, and the strongest equivalence check in `src/cli/task.rs:206-257` only compares parsed argument structs. There is no end-to-end CLI coverage proving that `task create/show/select/list` execute the same behavior as their project counterparts or that the task-facing output stays correct. Add integration tests that run both namespaces against a temp workspace and compare resulting state/output, especially for `task create` and the no-active-project path.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 2 -> Plan and Implement
